name: Capabilities
description: Deterministic transforms. Each capability is a pure function (input record + DB) -> output record. May call layers 00-02. Must not spawn processes, make network calls without a carrier record authorising it, or write to kernel tables directly except via the applications log.
invariants: every capability has a {id}.json descriptor and a {id}.php implementation
every implementation exports exactly one function named {id}_invoke(array, SQLite3): array
every capability logs its application to the applications table
network-calling capabilities (webhook_out) must check for a carrier record before calling out
